languages.text: {n}Ваше намерение продемонстрировать несгибаемый дух разбивается о факт того, что глазные мышцы застыли в полной неподвижности — так же, как и все остальное тело.{/n}
{n}This attempted display of your indomitable spirit is an instant failure — your eye muscles are completely immobile, just like the rest of your body.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Ваше намерение продемонстрировать несгибаемый дух разбивается о факт того, что глазные мышцы застыли в полной неподвижности — так же, как и все остальное тело.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}This attempted display of your indomitable spirit is an instant failure — your eye muscles are completely immobile, just like the rest of your body.{/n}
{n}This attempted display of your indomitable spirit is an instant failure — your eye muscles are completely immobile, just like the rest of your body.{/n}
{n}This attempted display of your indomitable spirit is an instant failure — your eye muscles are completely immobile, just like the rest of your body.{/n}

languages.text: {n}あなたの屈強な精神の試みは、瞬時に失敗しました。あなたの眼筋は、他の身体の部位と同じように、完全に動かないのです。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}This attempted display of your indomitable spirit is an instant failure — your eye muscles are completely immobile, just like the rest of your body.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}あなたの屈強な精神の試みは、瞬時に失敗しました。あなたの眼筋は、他の身体の部位と同じように、完全に動かないのです。{/n}

languages.text: {n}你试图展现不屈意志的尝试仅瞬间就宣告失败——你眼部的肌肉完全无法动弹，一如身体其他部分。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}This attempted display of your indomitable spirit is an instant failure — your eye muscles are completely immobile, just like the rest of your body.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你试图展现不屈意志的尝试仅瞬间就宣告失败——你眼部的肌肉完全无法动弹，一如身体其他部分。{/n}

languages.text: {n}El intento de demostrar la indomabilidad de tu espíritu fracasa al instante: los músculos de tus ojos permanecen tan inmóviles como el resto de tu cuerpo.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}This attempted display of your indomitable spirit is an instant failure — your eye muscles are completely immobile, just like the rest of your body.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El intento de demostrar la indomabilidad de tu espíritu fracasa al instante: los músculos de tus ojos permanecen tan inmóviles como el resto de tu cuerpo.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die versuchte Zurschaustellung deiner Unbeugsamkeit scheitert kläglich ... die Muskeln deiner Augen sind ebenso gelähmt wie der gesamte Rest deines Körpers.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}This attempted display of your indomitable spirit is an instant failure — your eye muscles are completely immobile, just like the rest of your body.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Die versuchte Zurschaustellung deiner Unbeugsamkeit scheitert kläglich ... die Muskeln deiner Augen sind ebenso gelähmt wie der gesamte Rest deines Körpers.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Votre démonstration d'insoumission se solde immédiatement par un échec : les muscles de vos yeux sont totalement immobiles, tout comme le reste de votre corps.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}This attempted display of your indomitable spirit is an instant failure — your eye muscles are completely immobile, just like the rest of your body.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Votre démonstration d'insoumission se solde immédiatement par un échec : les muscles de vos yeux sont totalement immobiles, tout comme le reste de votre corps.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Boyun eğmez ruhunu sergilemeye yönelik bu girişim, anında başarısızlıkla sonuçlanıyor. Göz kasların da tıpkı bedeninin geri kalanı gibi tamamen hareketsiz.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}This attempted display of your indomitable spirit is an instant failure — your eye muscles are completely immobile, just like the rest of your body.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Boyun eğmez ruhunu sergilemeye yönelik bu girişim, anında başarısızlıkla sonuçlanıyor. Göz kasların da tıpkı bedeninin geri kalanı gibi tamamen hareketsiz.{/n}
